class.name: radiation_layer::RadiationLocalLayer
class.description: Radiation Dynamic costmap layer for updating local costmap

class.name: radiation_layer::RadiationGlobalLayer
class.description: Radiation Dynamic costmap layer for updating global costmap

class.name: radiation_static_layer::RadiationStaticLayer
class.description: Radiation-based Static Costmap Layer using a static occupancy grid Topic: /radiation_static_map
